mapper.select: SELECT o.*, cu.id as customer_user_id, cu.username as customer_username, cu.nickname as customer_nickname, cu.avatar as customer_avatar, pu.id as player_user_id, pu.username as player_username, pu.nickname as player_nickname, pu.avatar as player_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON o.player_id = pu.id ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT o.*, cu.id as customer_user_id, cu.username as customer_username, cu.nickname as customer_nickname, cu.avatar as customer_avatar, pu.id as player_user_id, pu.username as player_username, pu.nickname as player_nickname, pu.avatar as player_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON o.player_id = pu.id WHERE o.id = #{orderId}

SELECT o.*, cu.id as customer_user_id, cu.username as customer_username, cu.nickname as customer_nickname, cu.avatar as customer_avatar, pu.id as player_user_id, pu.username as player_username, pu.nickname as player_nickname, pu.avatar as player_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON o.player_id = pu.id WHERE o.order_no = #{orderNo}

SELECT o.*, cu.id as customer_user_id, cu.username as customer_username, cu.nickname as customer_nickname, cu.avatar as customer_avatar, pu.id as player_user_id, pu.username as player_username, pu.nickname as player_nickname, pu.avatar as player_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON o.player_id = pu.id WHERE o.customer_id = #{customerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT o.*, cu.user_id as customer_user_id, cu.username as customer_username, cu.nickname as customer_nickname, cu.avatar as customer_avatar, pu.user_id as player_user_id, pu.username as player_username, pu.nickname as player_nickname, pu.avatar as player_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON o.player_id = pu.id WHERE o.player_id = #{playerId} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}

SELECT o.*, cu.user_id as customer_user_id, cu.username as customer_username, cu.nickname as customer_nickname, cu.avatar as customer_avatar, pu.user_id as player_user_id, pu.username as player_username, pu.nickname as player_nickname, pu.avatar as player_avatar FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN user cu ON o.customer_id = cu.id LEFT JOIN user pu ON o.player_id = pu.id WHERE o.status = #{status} ORDER BY o.create_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{limit}
mapper.update: UPDATE `order` SET order_no = #{orderNo}, customer_id = #{customerId}, player_id = #{playerId}, amount = #{amount}, quantity = #{quantity}, total_amount = #{totalAmount}, status = #{status}, pay_time = #{payTime}, complete_time = #{completeTime}, create_time = #{createTime} WHERE id = #{orderId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE customer_id = #{customerId} AND status != 5
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `order` WHERE player_id = #{playerId} AND status != 5
